human_verification.method: Manual review against issue #116, repository templates, authority-source requirements, and the validated delivery contract.

specialist_owned_sections: narrow CMDB boundary and adjacent-specialty rejection map
specialty-specific guidance for CI class governance, service relationship integrity, CMDB health interpretation, and reconciliation triage
shared meta-agent bootstrap metadata and request/response contracts
fallback behavior for stale, unavailable, low-confidence, or boundary-conflicting delegated outputs
market_ready_claim_support: Complete package exists at the issue-specified catalog path.
Authority sources are real public sources with publisher, review dates, refresh intervals, and decay policy.
Evaluation results meet the 0.90 minimum pass-rate threshold with no unreviewed regressions.
Deployment and marketing artifacts document runtime, tenant isolation, rollback path, monitoring/logging expectations, buyer profile, subscription model, proof points, and go-to-market gaps.

specialist_owned_evidence: The manifest keeps the boundary focused on CMDB governance, health, relationships, and reconciliation guidance rather than asset accounting, service ownership, or platform engineering implementation.
Authority-source coverage spans ISO, official ITIL practice guidance, and vendor-official ServiceNow, Atlassian, and Freshworks documentation relevant to CMDB operations.
Issue-required shared meta-agent delegation and safe local fallback contracts are explicitly documented in manifest.yaml.
delegated_meta_agent_evidence: Best-practice corpus expansion is delegated to #225 with a safe local-baseline fallback.
Scenario normalization is delegated to #302 while retaining issue-local scenario coverage and acceptance thresholds.
Readiness, deployment, commercialization, and source-policy normalization are delegated to #303, #304, #305, and #306 without blocking safe package startup.
notes: validated claim is limited to repository packaging readiness and evidence completeness, not external revenue or customer adoption proof.
Human verification is recorded and no unreviewed regressions remain.
Adjacent platform engineering, asset accounting, procurement, endpoint administration, and broad governance ownership are explicitly rejected.
